cells.rationale: Durable ownership, atomic publication, and cancellation races create subtle cross-module correctness invariants where an unsafe abstraction can leak or destroy windows.
Restart-safe finalizer convergence spans maintenance, persistence, garbage collection, pruning, CLI semantics, and race handling as a cross-cutting architectural cascade.
The edit path is clear, but autoclose authorization depends on preserving a subtle provenance invariant that must fail closed against cross-run destruction.
